scenes.headline: Your child's RM50K degree becomes RM120K in 18 years
scenes.body: Local degrees inflate at 5% per year. Bank savings grow at 2%. The gap is RM49K — and it's silent.
scenes.shotNotes: static, taller portrait composition with vertical reading flow

thumbnailBrief: Alert / loss-prevention tone. Navy-dark background, high contrast. Headline at top in white (logo's 'Engineer' becomes white per dark-bg variant). Bar chart in middle showing RM50K → RM120K growth vs the savings-account RM50K → RM71K shortfall. Orange callout on the gap. Body copy at bottom, muted but readable.
